name: Chocolate Chip Date Nut Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup butter or margarine (at room temperature)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, pour 1/4 cup boiling water over chopped dates and let cool.
2. Grease an 8-inch square, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking pan. Set aside.
3. Cream together 1/2 cup sugar and 1/3 cup butter until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg to the creamed sugar mixture and blend well.
5. Sift flour, salt, baking powder, and cocoa into a separate bowl.
6. Alternately add the date-flour mixture to the butter-sugar mixture.
7. Pour batter into prepared pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
8. In a small bowl, combine 1/4 cup sugar, chocolate bits, and nuts. Sprinkle topping over the batter and press lightly.
9. Cover the pan and microwave for 7 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool on the cake pan for 10 minutes.
